context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

I'm configuring the OpAMP supervisor for Fleet Management. Our region is eu2. My coralogix exporter is using domain: eu2.coralogix.com but the supervisor keeps getting connection refused. What should the supervisor endpoint be?

checklist.name: https-ingress-eu2-coralogix-com
checklist.description: The response matches the pattern: https://ingress\.eu2\.coralogix\.com

checklist.name: explains-that-the-opamp-supervisor-uses-a-dif
checklist.description: Explains that the OpAMP supervisor uses a DIFFERENT endpoint from the coralogix data exporter — it needs the full URL with scheme, `https://ingress.<region>.coralogix.com`, not the bare hostname that goes in the exporter's `domain:` field.
